title: Transforms
description: translate, scale, rotate — cheap, GPU-friendly motion.

questions.prompt: Which transform is cheapest to animate (avoids layout)?
questions.explanation: translate is composited — no layout or paint on most browsers.

options: 50% of its OWN width to the right
questions.explanation: Percentages in transform are relative to the element itself.

options: The anchor point for rotation/scale (default: center)
questions.explanation: Default is 50% 50% (center). Change it to rotate around a corner, etc.

questions.prompt: Which chains rotation THEN scale (order matters)?
questions.explanation: Order is left-to-right. Different order = different visual result.
Perspective on the parent gives depth; alternatively perspective(N) inline in the transform.

questions.prompt: Center this absolutely-positioned box with transform.
questions.explanation: transform: translate(-50%, -50%) pulls back by half its own size.
